Taken 2

"First they took his daughter. Now they're coming for him."

6.4
2012MOVIEPG-13Released

Synopsis

In Istanbul, retired CIA operative Bryan Mills and his wife are taken hostage by the father of a kidnapper Mills killed while rescuing his daughter.

Tags

kidnappingfbiturkeypolice chaseteenage daughterstealing a carex-husband ex-wife relationshipalbanianu.s. embassyaggressivefurious
